## GYEON - Q²M ECOWash


**Gyeon Q2M ECOWash** is a multi-use product that allows you to quickly and safely clean your vehicle without requiring running water. It also means that you don't require a drain or have to allow any detergents to drip onto the ground. This makes it a very useful product in areas that prohibit run off in drainage systems.


The concentrated formula of Q2M ECOWash means it can be used in one of 3 ways. It can be used as a waterless wash, rinseless wash, and as a drying aid. As well as being a concentrated formula, it is also infused with SiO2 which makes it slick, very glossy and provides water-repellency and self-cleaning abilities.



### Using Gyeon Q2M ECOWash


**Waterless Wash: **dilute 1:10 - 1:15 in to a spray bottle. Shake gently to mix and spray liberally on the surface. Using a clean microfibre towel, wipe in a straight line motion until a you have achieved a streak-free finish. It is important to change the towel often to keep the surface as clean as possible and minimise the risk of inflicting swirl marks or scratches.


**Rinseless Wash: ** use 50-80ml per 12L of water in your wash bucket. Soak multiple microfibre towels in the solution, wash panel by panel, changing the towels often to minimise the risk of inflicting swirl marks or scratches.


**Drying Aid: **dilute 1:20 in a spray bottle, shake gently to mix and either spray directly on to the wet surface, or straight on to your drying towel and proceed to dry the vehicle in the usual way.


**Sizes Available: **500ml & 1L


### GYEON Q²M ECOWash Reviews

### GYEON Q²M ECOWash – Frequently Asked Questions

Got questions? You’re in the right place! Whether you’re a first-time user or a seasoned pro, our Frequently Asked Questions section is designed to be your go-to resource for quick answers, troubleshooting tips, and clever tricks to unlock the full potential of the GYEON Q²M ECOWash.

What is GYEON Q²M ECOWash and what is it designed to do?

GYEON Q²M ECOWash is a versatile, concentrated cleaning solution designed for washing vehicles without requiring running water or drainage systems. This multi-use product can function as a waterless wash, rinseless wash, or drying aid, making it ideal for areas with water restrictions or where runoff into drainage systems is prohibited. The formula is infused with SiO2 technology, providing a slick, glossy finish with water-repellent and self-cleaning properties.

How do I use Q²M ECOWash as a waterless wash?

For waterless washing, dilute Q²M ECOWash at a ratio of 1:10 to 1:15 in a spray bottle and shake gently to mix. Spray the solution liberally onto the surface and wipe with a clean microfibre towel using straight-line motions until you achieve a streak-free finish. It's crucial to change towels frequently to maintain cleanliness and minimise the risk of swirl marks or scratches on your vehicle's paintwork.

What dilution ratio should I use for rinseless washing?

For rinseless washing, use 50-80ml of Q²M ECOWash per 12 litres of water in your wash bucket. Soak multiple microfibre towels in the solution and wash panel by panel, changing towels often to reduce the risk of inflicting swirl marks. This method is particularly effective when combined with proper washing techniques outlined in our [Two Bucket Wash - A Comprehensive Guide](https://www.cleanyourcar.co.uk/car-detailing-blog/two-bucket-wash).

Can Q²M ECOWash be used as a drying aid?

Yes, Q²M ECOWash works excellently as a drying aid when diluted 1:20 in a spray bottle. After mixing, spray the solution directly onto wet surfaces or onto your drying towel before use. This application enhances the drying process while adding the product's SiO2 benefits, leaving a glossy, water-repellent finish on your vehicle's surface.

What makes GYEON's ECOWash different from other car shampoos?

GYEON Q²M ECOWash stands out due to its concentrated, multi-purpose formula and SiO2 infusion, which provides superior gloss and water-repellent properties. Unlike traditional [Car Shampoo](https://www.cleanyourcar.co.uk/exterior/washing-and-drying/car-wash-shampoos) products that require rinsing, this eco-friendly solution eliminates the need for running water and drainage, making it environmentally responsible and suitable for water-restricted areas. [Gyeon](https://www.cleanyourcar.co.uk/gyeon) has engineered this product to deliver professional-grade results while being versatile enough for multiple cleaning applications.

Is Q²M ECOWash safe for all vehicle surfaces?

Yes, GYEON Q²M ECOWash is formulated to be safe on all exterior vehicle surfaces including paintwork, glass, plastic trim, and wheels. The SiO2-infused formula is pH-balanced and designed to clean effectively without damaging delicate surfaces. However, always ensure you're using clean microfibre towels and following proper application techniques to maintain the integrity of your vehicle's finish.
